epigraph.quote: an old lady & man with a dog in a push chair & even Batman & Robin

moments.quote: Mrs. Beale & 2 of her daughters sewed magnificent wall hangings, bedspreads, cushions & chair seats
lovely big airey rooms & views of woods
Great noisy children at the back, a nice service.
At Steyning we had a stupendous tea - rhubarb scones, rhubarb jam

images.caption: The Steyning Tea Rooms business card

moments.quote: When Queen Elizabeth called the Percys to live in the South, where she could keep an eye on them, they decided to develop the lodge into a home.

images.caption: Petworth House & Park. W. Sussex. Warming side cupboard with sliding doors & hotplate on top.

moments.quote: We had supper & slept at Longwood House

images.caption: Tulips + Roses with tracings made preparatory to embroidery. Drawing by Gertrude Jekyll.
